name: arihaan-enterprises
description: ARIHAAN ENTERPRISES – monorepo root. React client is in client/, Node.js server is in server/.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:client && npm run install:server
scripts.dev: npm run free-ports && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&&npx concurrently "npm run start:client" "npm run start:server"
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run free-ports && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&&npx concurrently "cd client && npm run start:mobile" "cd server && npm run start:mobile"
